domainAccountId.description: Account that submitted the request (Deprecated. It is equal to projectId)

projectId.description: Project for which the request was submitted

workspaceId.description: Workspace for which the request was submitted

status.description: Current processing status of the request

error.description: Error description for requests that were submitted but failed during analysis or processing

userAction.description: Last user action on the request

userActionUpdated.description: Time of last user action update in ISO 8601

created.description: Creation time of the request in ISO 8601

lastUpdated.description: Last updated time of the request in ISO 8601

stoppedStatusReason.description: Description of why job status is STOPPED
